latin: Magister parvus et viridis discipulum suum, qui desperabat, obiurgavit: 'tempta non est. fac aut ne facias. temptatio nulla est.'

questions.prompt: What does the small green master teach?
questions.target: Do or do not — there is no try
choices: Do or do not — there is no try

translation: A small, green master scolded his student, who was despairing: 'There is no try. Do or do not. There is no trying.'
